results.title: Coast’s new dog laws: Confusion and anger erupt
Ansiba moves court over defamatory videos; Shwetha Menon won’t step down as AMMA chief
results.description: Ansiba Hassan takes legal action over allegedly defamatory and sexually coloured social media videos, while Shwetha Menon fights back against a "pre-planned agenda" to "hijack" AMMA.

results.title: BREAKING: Monsoon Session of Parliament of India Set to Begin July 20 – High-Stakes Agenda Ahead
results.description: The Monsoon Session of the Parliament of India is scheduled to commence from July 20, marking a crucial phase in the country’s legislative calendar. The session is expected to bring the government and opposition face-to-face in a series of high-stakes political and policy debates. n18oc_breaking-newsNews18 Mobile App - https://onelink.to/desc-youtube

results.title: Vikings coach has high praise for Jets GM, his ex-teammate at San Diego State
results.description: Kevin O’Connell found himself repeatedly sending some version of the same text message to his ex-college roommate during the Jets offseason.
